summary: Iteration 11: Landing Page Redesign, Payment Flow, Admin Disputes, and Notifications - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 20+ UI elements verified. Landing page has new hero, features, CTA sections. ISO/Market handles payment return params. Admin disputes page shows Open/Resolved tabs with dispute cards. Notification bell shows badge count and dropdown with mark-all-read.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified. Landing page redesign complete with hero, features, CTA, and footer sections. Payment checkout uses emergentintegrations StripeCheckout with sk_test_emergent key (SIMULATED - may not create real Stripe sessions but validation works). Admin disputes page at /admin/disputes shows Open (0) and Resolved (3) tabs with full dispute card UI including trade details, dispute reason, response, and resolution. Browser notifications use Notification API - permission request on mount, shows notifications when unread count increases. Notification bell in navbar shows badge with unread count and dropdown with recent notifications.

CTA section 'Ready to Join The Hive?' with 'join the hive' button
Footer with '© 2026' and 'Made with love for vinyl collectors'
NO spinning vinyl artwork in footer
